creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
POV: your coffee comes with a mini tour of London 🇬🇧☕️

This super cute rotating cup features iconic spots like Big Ben, St. Paul’s Cathedral, Covent Garden Piazza, and even a classic black cab 🚕✨ Found in Covent Garden @cream.dream_london and honestly… it’s more about the aesthetic than the coffee 😅

£6.50 for a paper cup ? would you pay it? I kind of would just for the vibe 👀

#London #LondonLife #CoventGarden #LondonCoffee #LondonSpots

transcription.text: and I'll see you in the next one. Bye. Transcribed by https://otter.ai
